name: Face Performance Analysis Subquery 3
description: This extracts an individual path for data to flow down, measuring the cost of a singular branch after the routing operator.
sql_form: SELECT combine_faces(total_faces, original_img, face) as combined_image FROM ( SELECT img_id, original_img, (IF face IS NOT NULL blur(face) ELSE face) as face, known_face FROM ( SELECT original_img, img_id, recognize_faces(original_img) as (total_faces, face) FROM ( SELECT original_img, img_id FROM image_source ) OUTER CHROMA JOIN ( SELECT known_face FROM known_faces ) WHERE cosine(face, known_face) < 0.9 ) ) GROUP BY img_id HAVING COUNT(*) = len(first_nonnull(total_faces))

operators.description: split the data up into the bbs and derive the number of faces to expect
operators.name: split_bbs_insightface

args.description: before passing this, crop and resize the image to the size of the model

outputs.description: embedding field is always named embedding and will be used as if it is flat because it must be

operators.description: lookup for data from *.npy file for this particular dataset
operators.name: in_memory_lookup_udf_tiny
